overview.text: Surf Life Saving NSW is the peak body for volunteer surf lifesaving and beach rescue across NSW. It coordinates beach patrols, swift-water rescue on the coast, jet-ski rescue, helicopter rescue and aerial surveillance, and community drowning-prevention programs.

items: Around 78,000 members across 129 surf lifesaving clubs in 11 branches.
Operates the Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service jointly with NSW Ambulance.
Provides Australian Lifeguard Service (paid lifeguards) on more than 60 beaches outside volunteer patrol hours.
Rescue Water Craft (jet ski) operators stage at high-risk locations during summer.
